items.title_en: The war on terror primed America for autocracy
items.title_zh: 恐怖主义战争为美国铺路走向专制
items.summary_en: The war on terror is framed as a driver of American autocratic tendencies, with long-standing implications for civil liberties and government power. The piece argues that security regimes have hardened centralized authority, shaping policy beyond the battlefield.
items.summary_zh: 文章将恐怖主义战争视为推动美国走向专制的因素，讨论对公民自由与政府权力的长期影响。作者认为安全体制强化了集中的权力，影响超越前线战争的政策走向。

items.title_en: Extreme Heat conference cancelled due to extreme heat warning
items.title_zh: 极端高温研讨会因警报取消
items.summary_en: Extreme Heat conference was canceled due to an extreme heat warning, illustrating climate's disruption of scholarly gatherings. The incident underscores the growing need for resilient event planning and climate-aware governance.
items.summary_zh: 因极端高温警报而取消的研讨会凸显气候变化对学术活动的直接影响。事件强调需要更具韧性的活动安排与气候友好型治理。

items.title_en: F3
items.title_zh: F3 文件格式
items.summary_en: F3 is a new, open-source file format developed by the Future File Format project. It aims to provide efficient data representation and fast parsing, with a focus on simplicity and modern workloads.
items.summary_zh: F3 是未来文件格式项目推出的全新开源文件格式，旨在提供高效的数据表示与快速解析，面向现代工作负载，倡导简洁与跨平台兼容。

items.title_en: Meta Pauses Employee-Tracking Program Following Internal Data Leak
items.title_zh: Meta 暂停员工跟踪计划，因内部数据泄露
items.summary_en: Meta paused its employee-tracking program after an internal data leak, signaling a pivot toward stricter data governance and privacy considerations. The move underscores how security incidents can reshape corporate policies around monitoring and data access.
items.summary_zh: Meta 因内部数据泄露而暂停了员工跟踪计划，体现公司在隐私与数据治理方面的权衡。这次事件凸显安全事故如何推动监控政策与数据访问的调整。

items.title_en: What we call "age verification" is actually mass surveillance
items.title_zh: 年龄验证其实是大规模监控
items.summary_en: Age verification is reframed as mass surveillance by privacy advocates, arguing that broad age checks enable pervasive data collection and tracking. The piece calls for privacy-preserving alternatives and stronger safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 隐私倡导者将年龄验证重新界定为大规模监控，认为广泛的年龄检查会导致广泛的数据收集与跟踪。文章呼吁采用隐私保护替代方案并加强安全措施。

items.title_en: Vulnerability reports are not special anymore
items.title_zh: 漏洞报告已不再特殊
items.summary_en: Vulnerability reports are no longer rare or special, circulating in volumes that overwhelm maintainers. The post argues for better triage, clearer disclosure processes, and stronger incentives to treat reports as actionable signals rather than novelty. Without refined processes, the value of responsible disclosure risks eroding.
items.summary_zh: 漏洞报告如今大量涌现，已不再具有稀缺性和紧迫性。文章主张需要更高效的分流、明确的披露流程，以及将报告转化为可执行信号的激励机制。若不改进，负责任披露的价值可能受损。

items.title_en: Jerry's Map
items.title_zh: Jerry 的地图
items.summary_en: Jerry's Map appears to be an interactive map project that visualizes geospatial data.
items.summary_zh: Jerry's Map 看起来是一个用于可视化地理数据的交互式地图项目。

items.title_en: FUTO Swipe – A new swipe typing model
items.title_zh: FUTO Swipe 轻扫输入模型
items.summary_en: FUTO Swipe introduces a new swipe-typing model designed to improve accuracy and speed on mobile keyboards. The model promises smarter prediction and resilience across layouts, with a public demo at the project site.
items.summary_zh: FUTO Swipe 推出全新的滑动输入模型，旨在提升移动端键盘的准确性与输入速度。该模型声称在不同布局下都具备更智能的预测能力，公开演示在项目站点可见。

items.title_en: Fired by Google for creating the Google workspace CLI
items.title_zh: 因为创建 Google Workspace CLI 而被解雇
items.summary_en: A former Google employee reports being fired for building the Google Workspace CLI, raising questions about internal policies toward external tooling and open-source contributions.
items.summary_zh: 据称一名前 Google 员工因开发 Google Workspace CLI 而被解雇，引发关于内部政策对外部工具和开源贡献态度的讨论。

items.title_en: Steam Machine launches today
items.title_zh: Steam 机器
items.summary_en: Valve's Steam Machine hardware page surfaces its long-running attempt to bring PC gaming into the living room with console-like form factors. The effort illustrates the ongoing tension between performance, usability, and ecosystem control in living-room gaming hardware.
items.summary_zh: Valve 在 Steam 机器硬件页再次出现，展示其将 PC 游戏带入客厅的长期尝试，强调性能、易用性与生态系统控制之间的权衡。此举反映出游戏硬件在家庭娱乐中的定位与挑战。

items.title_en: In memory of the man who put red and green squiggles under words
items.title_zh: 纪念在文本下方标出红色和绿色波浪线的工程师
items.summary_en: A memorial piece recalls the engineer who introduced red and green squiggles under words in text editors, highlighting how tiny UX cues shaped modern editing and software behavior.
items.summary_zh: 追忆在文本编辑器中首次引入“红色/绿色下划线”提示的工程师，文章强调这类细微的用户体验信号对现代文本编辑和软件行为的深远影响。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi Pico W as USB Wi-Fi Adapter
items.title_zh: 将 Raspberry Pi Pico W 作为 USB 无线网卡
items.summary_en: A project shows Pico W can act as a USB Wi-Fi adapter, enabling a host computer to use the Pico as a network interface. This demonstrates flexible USB gadget capabilities of RP2040 and opens DIY routes for portable networking or offline tethering. It is a handy trick for hobbyists building tiny, portable networks.
items.summary_zh: 该项目展示了 Pico W 作为 USB 无线网卡工作，使主机可以通过 Pico 的 USB 端口获得网络接口。展示了 RP2040 的 USB gadget 能力，为便携网络和离线共享等场景提供 DIY 方案。

items.title_en: Mistral OCR 4
items.title_zh: Mistral OCR 第4版
items.summary_en: Mistral AI releases OCR 4, a new optical character recognition model with improved accuracy and multilingual support, optimized for real-world documents and noisy scans. It raises the bar for automated document understanding.
items.summary_zh: Mistral AI 发布 OCR 4，提升识别准确度并扩展多语言支持，针对现实世界文档与嘈杂扫描场景进行了优化。这将推动文档自动化理解的水平提升。

items.title_en: Trains halted across Germany because of communication system problem
items.title_zh: 德国因通信系统故障导致全国铁路停运
items.summary_en: A nationwide communication-system outage halted trains across Germany, demonstrating how rail operations depend on centralized tech. Operators rerouted services and workers investigate the root cause, with potential safety and timetable ripple effects.
items.summary_zh: 德国因通信系统故障导致全国铁路停运，暴露了铁路运营对集中式通信的高度依赖。运营方正在调整线路、处理延误，并调查根本原因，事件对安全与时刻表造成连锁影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: TikZ Editor – WYSIWYG editor for figures in LaTeX
items.title_zh: Show HN: TikZ 编辑器——LaTeX 图形的所见即所得编辑器
items.summary_en: Show HN: TikZ Editor offers a WYSIWYG interface for creating LaTeX figures, exporting clean TikZ code and live previews. It lowers the barrier to publication-ready diagrams and speeds up LaTeX workflows by removing the steep TikZ syntax learning curve.
items.summary_zh: 该工具提供可视化编辑 TikZ 的界面，直接绘制并导出整洁的 TikZ 代码与预览。对科研写作者而言，降低图形制作门槛，提升文档可视化表达效率，缩短从草图到成品的时间。

items.title_en: Don't verify email addresses by sending spam to them
items.title_zh: 不要通过向邮箱发送垃圾邮件来验证地址
items.summary_en: A stance against verifying email addresses by spamming recipients is discussed; safer approaches like double opt-in, verified emails, and controlled verification flows are recommended to avoid harassment and deliverability issues.
items.summary_zh: 文章批评通过向目标邮箱发送垃圾邮件来验证地址的做法，强调应采用更安全的验证流程，例如双重确认、受控的邮箱验证，以及在不骚扰用户的前提下完成验证。

items.title_en: Unlimited OCR: One-shot long-horizon parsing
items.title_zh: Unlimited OCR：一次性长时域解析
items.summary_en: Unlimited OCR introduces one-shot long-horizon parsing for documents, enabling robust recognition and parsing over long content in a single pass. This advancement improves efficiency for enterprise document processing and hints at broader capabilities for scalable OCR in long-form workflows.
items.summary_zh: Unlimited OCR 提出一次性对长篇文档进行解析的能力，提升单次完成对长文本的识别与解析的鲁棒性与效率。该进展有望显著优化企业级文档处理，并推动长文档工作流中的 OCR 能力扩展。

items.title_en: The worthlessness of Vitamin D is mildly exaggerated
items.title_zh: 维生素D的作用被略微夸大
items.summary_en: A data-driven analysis argues that while severe Vitamin D deficiency matters, sweeping claims about supplements' health benefits are overstated. The article suggests benefits are modest at best and mostly confined to those with clear deficiencies, with sunlight and balanced diet as the primary sources.
items.summary_zh: 一篇基于证据的分析指出，虽然严重缺乏维生素D 的风险值得关注，但关于补充剂的普遍健康效益的夸大说法并不成立。研究显示，除了明确缺乏的人群，补充维生素D 的收益通常有限，日晒和均衡饮食才是关键。

items.title_en: Claude Tag
items.title_zh: Claude Tag 标签
items.summary_en: Claude Tag adds tagging capabilities to the Claude AI, enabling users to attach metadata to outputs for governance, auditing, and safety monitoring. The feature is positioned to improve traceability and control over model behavior in production.
items.summary_zh: Claude Tag 为 Claude AI 增添输出标记功能，允许在生成结果中附加元数据，便于治理、审计与安全监控，提升生产环境中的可追溯性和行为控制。

items.title_en: AI's Affordability Crisis
items.title_zh: AI 的可负担性危机
items.summary_en: The post argues that AI costs are rising as models grow and infrastructure demands pressure budgets, threatening broad access. It advocates efficiency, open weights, and hardware innovations to keep AI affordable for startups and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出模型规模增大、基础设施成本上升正在拉高 AI 的使用成本，威胁到普及和创新。呼吁通过更高效的模型、开源权重和硬件优化来保持可负担性。

items.title_en: Swift Package Index joins Apple
items.title_zh: Swift Package Index 与 Apple 合作
items.summary_en: Swift Package Index, a community-maintained registry of Swift packages, has joined Apple to broaden its integration with Apple developer tooling. The move could streamline package discovery and consistency across the Swift ecosystem, accelerating adoption on Apple platforms and easing maintenance for package authors.
items.summary_zh: 作为社区维护的 Swift 包注册表，Swift Package Index 宣布加入苹果，旨在加强与苹果开发工具链的整合。此举可能提升包的发现性和跨生态的一致性，帮助开发者在苹果平台上更快采用 Swift，并简化包作者的维护工作。

items.title_en: California AB 2047 makes 3d printers off-limits to students, educators, business
items.title_zh: 加州 AB 2047 将3D打印机限制，学生、教育者与企业无法使用
items.summary_en: California AB 2047 would restrict access to 3D printers for students, educators, and businesses, effectively taking hands-on 3D printing out of classrooms, schools, and maker spaces. The proposal highlights a safety-vs-access tradeoff, with critics warning it could curb STEM education and local innovation while supporters argue for stricter controls.
items.summary_zh: 加州拟议的 AB 2047 将限制学生、教育工作者和企业对3D打印机的使用，实际削减了在课堂、学校和创客空间进行动手制作的机会。该法案将安全性与可及性之之间的权衡暴露出来，批评者担心会打击 STEM 教育和本地创新，而支持者则强调对潜在滥用的更严格控制。

items.title_en: The Coming Loop
items.title_zh: 来临的循环
items.summary_en: The Coming Loop is a reflective piece about upcoming shifts in programming and tooling, exploring what the next era of software development may bring.
items.summary_zh: 《来临的循环》是一篇关于即将到来的编程与工具链变革的反思性文章，探讨软件开发的下一个时代可能带来的变化。

items.title_en: Madison Square Garden compiled a list of activists against facial recognition
items.title_zh: 麦迪逊广场花园整理反对人脸识别的活动人士名单
items.summary_en: Investigative report reveals MSG compiled a dossier on activists opposing facial recognition, raises concerns about surveillance of political activity and corporate data practices.
items.summary_zh: 报道揭示麦迪逊广场花园曾为反对人脸识别的活动人士整理档案，引发对政治活动监控和企业数据行为的担忧。

items.title_en: Crypto in 2026: Oh, This Is the Bad Place
items.title_zh: 2026 年的加密货币：这地方真糟糕
items.summary_en: Crypto in 2026 is portrayed as a troubling landscape, with regulatory crackdowns, scams, energy concerns, and hype that may not sustain. The piece advises caution and skepticism about long-term viability, urging readers to separate real tech progress from marketing noise and hype.
items.summary_zh: 2026 年的加密货币前景被描述为充满隐忧——监管加强、骗局横行、能耗与炒作并存。文章劝诫读者保持谨慎，辨别真正的技术进步与市场噪声，评估项目和代币的长期可行性。

items.title_en: Israel targeted Gaza children resulting in genocide, UN inquiry says
items.title_zh: 联合国调查称以色列针对加沙儿童的行动构成种族灭绝
items.summary_en: A UN inquiry concluded that Israeli actions in Gaza targeted children and amounted to genocide, prompting debates over accountability and international law. The report underscores calls for independent investigations and civilian protections in conflict zones.
items.summary_zh: 联合国调查称以色列在加沙地区针对儿童的行动构成种族灭绝，引发关于问责与国际法的广泛讨论。该报告强化了推动独立调查与在冲突地区保护平民的呼声。

items.title_en: Algorithmic Monocultures in Hiring
items.title_zh: 招聘中的算法单一化问题
items.summary_en: AI-powered hiring tools can embed racial bias and create systemic rejection patterns, risking reduced diversity. The piece calls for auditing, transparency, and human oversight to mitigate harm.
items.summary_zh: AI 招聘工具可能内化并放大种族偏见，导致系统性排斥，危及多样性。文章呼吁对工具进行审计、提高透明度，并保留人类监督以降低伤害。

items.title_en: Elevated error rate across multiple models
items.title_zh: 多模型的错误率上升
items.summary_en: A status update notes an elevated error rate across multiple AI models, highlighting reliability challenges in hosted services and the need for robust monitoring and failover.
items.summary_zh: 发布的状态更新显示多模型的错误率升高，凸显托管服务的可靠性挑战以及对健壮监控和容错的需求。

items.title_en: San Diego photologs from the 1970s
items.title_zh: 1970年代圣地亚哥摄影日志
items.summary_en: A collection of San Diego photo logs from the 1970s offers a visual snapshot of urban life during that era. The archive showcases street scenes and public space usage, providing historical context for city development and cultural shifts.
items.summary_zh: 一组来自1970年代的圣地亚哥摄影日志以影像记录了当时的城市生活，展现街景、公共空间的使用以及城市发展与文化变迁的历史脉络。

items.title_en: Digital euro clears key hurdle as EU seeks to break free from U.S. credit cards
items.title_zh: 数字欧元获关键支持，欧盟欲摆脱对美国信用卡的依赖
items.summary_en: The EU advances a digital euro after securing parliamentary backing, aiming to create a central bank–backed digital payment instrument that could reduce reliance on U.S. card networks; policy scrutiny centers on privacy, competition, and financial sovereignty.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟在获得议会支持后推进数字欧元，旨在提供央行支持的数字支付工具，降低对美国信用卡网络的依赖。隐私、竞争与金融主权成为讨论焦点。

items.title_en: GLM-5.2 – How to Run Locally
items.title_zh: Unsloth GLM-5.2：如何在本地运行
items.summary_en: Offers practical steps to run the GLM-5.2 model locally, enabling offline inference without relying on cloud services. Running locally improves privacy and latency and gives developers more control, but it also demands hardware and setup considerations.
items.summary_zh: 提供将 GLM-5.2 本地化运行的实用步骤，使离线推理不再依赖云端。 本地运行提升隐私与延迟控制，但需要合适的硬件和安装配置。

items.title_en: Deno Desktop
items.title_zh: Deno 桌面版
items.summary_en: Deno Desktop introduces a cross-platform desktop runtime for building apps with TypeScript and JavaScript using the Deno toolchain. The docs outline how to create, package, and run desktop apps with Deno, bridging web UI tech with native OS capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Deno Desktop 引入一个跨平台桌面运行时，方便用 TypeScript/JavaScript 基于 Deno 构建桌面应用。文档介绍了创建、打包与运行桌面应用的方式，以及与原生操作系统能力的对接。

items.title_en: Pledging another $400k to the Zig software foundation
items.title_zh: 再向 Zig 软件基金会捐赠40万美元
items.summary_en: Zig's ecosystem keeps growing as a further $400k is pledged to its software foundation. The donation signals continued community support and could accelerate language tooling, compiler work, and ecosystem initiatives that push Zig toward broader adoption and stability.
items.summary_zh: Zig 生态系统再次获得资金支持，向其软件基金会再捐出40万美元，显示社区的持续支持。捐款有望推动语言工具链、编译器改进和生态项目，加速 Zig 的普及与稳定性提升。

items.title_en: United Wizards of the Coast recognized by NLRB
items.title_zh: NLRB 认可 Wizards of the Coast 员工工会
items.summary_en: The NLRB has recognized a union at Wizards of the Coast, giving employees a formal path to collective bargaining over wages, benefits, and working conditions, and could influence labor relations in the gaming industry.
items.summary_zh: 美国全国劳资关系委员会已正式承认 Wizards of the Coast 的工会，赋予员工通过集体谈判争取薪酬、福利与工作条件的权利。这一举动可能改变游戏行业的劳资关系，并对公司内部的协作产生重要影响。

items.title_en: Canada plans 'nuclear renaissance' with up to 10 reactors built by 2040
items.title_zh: 加拿大计划到2040年建设多达10座核反应堆，开启核能复兴
items.summary_en: Canada outlines a nuclear renaissance with up to 10 reactors by 2040, signaling a larger low-carbon electricity mix. The plan emphasizes energy security and emissions goals while acknowledging regulatory, cost, and public-acceptance hurdles.
items.summary_zh: 加拿大提出到2040年建设多达10座核反应堆的核能复兴计划，意在扩大低碳电力结构。该方案强调能源安全与减排目标，同时面临监管、成本与公众接受度的挑战。

items.title_en: Flock-Powered Police Chiefs Stalking Women Shows Why Warrants Are Needed
items.title_zh: Flock 监控网络让警察追踪女性，凸显为何需要搜令
items.summary_en: A report shows police using a private surveillance network to track a woman, underscoring the risks of warrantless, opaque data sharing. It reinforces why warrants, oversight, and clear data governance are essential when relying on third-party camera networks.
items.summary_zh: 报道揭示警察依赖私人监控网络追踪一名女性，凸显在使用第三方摄像网络时，缺乏授权与透明度的监控带来的风险。强调在此类数据资源下，必须有搜令、监督与明确的数据治理。

items.title_en: VibeThinker: 3B param model that beats Opus 4.5 on reasoning with novel SFT+GRPO
items.title_zh: VibeThinker：3B 参数模型在推理方面击败 Opus 4.5，采用新颖的 SFT+GRPO
items.summary_en: VibeThinker is a 3B-parameter model that reportedly beats Opus 4.5 on reasoning thanks to a novel SFT+GRPO training regime. This challenges the idea that bigger models are needed for strong reasoning and highlights new fine-tuning strategies.
items.summary_zh: VibeThinker 是一个 3B 参数模型，据称在推理任务中胜过 Opus 4.5，使用了新颖的 SFT+GRPO 训练方法。这一结果挑战了“大模型才有强推理能力”的直觉，并突出了新的微调策略。

items.title_en: Will It Mythos?
items.title_zh: 它会成就 Mythos 吗？
items.summary_en: A concise look at whether Mythos lives up to expectations, examining what the project promises and what challenges remain.
items.summary_zh: 简要评估 Mythos 是否如期实现，探讨它的承诺与面临的挑战。

items.title_en: The truth about being a manager
items.title_zh: 成为经理的真相
items.summary_en: A candid piece debunks myths about management, arguing that being a manager is more about enabling others than issuing orders, with practical guidance on building teams and communication.
items.summary_zh: 这篇直言不讳的文章揭穿了管理者的神话，认为管理并非单纯发号施令，而是帮助他人实现目标，并提供打造高效团队与沟通的实用建议。

items.title_en: Lift4D: Harmonizing Single-View 3D Estimation for 4D Reconstruction In-the-Wild
items.title_zh: Lift4D：将单视角3D估计整合以实现野外场景的4D重建
items.summary_en: Lift4D harmonizes single-view 3D estimation to enable robust 4D reconstruction in-the-wild, producing temporally coherent dynamic scenes from unconstrained footage. This advances AR/VR, robotics, and film workflows by enabling reliable monocular-based 4D models.
items.summary_zh: Lift4D 将单视角 3D 估计协调起来，实现对未受控场景的时序一致的 4D 重建。利用单目线索在时间上保持一致，能够从自由拍摄的素材中构建动态场景模型，推动 AR/VR、机器人和影视工作流的发展。

items.title_en: The Low-Tech AI of Elden Ring
items.title_zh: 《艾尔登法环》的低技术 AI
items.summary_en: The Elden Ring piece argues that its AI uses surprisingly simple rules to deliver believable enemies, showing how low-complexity AI can still produce compelling gameplay at scale.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出《艾尔登法环》中的 AI 实现其实相对简单，却能提供逼真的对手行为，显示低复杂度 AI 也能在大规模游戏中带来出色的玩法体验。

items.title_en: The new HTTP QUERY method explained
items.title_zh: 新 HTTP QUERY 方法解读
items.summary_en: A proposed HTTP QUERY method treats server-side queries as a first-class operation, letting clients submit structured queries and receive results in a standardized way. The write-up outlines expected semantics, payload formats, and caching considerations, and discusses potential benefits for API ergonomics alongside adoption challenges for tooling and proxies.
items.summary_zh: 提出了一种将服务器端查询作为 HTTP 端点的新方法，让客户端提交结构化查询并获得标准化结果。文中讨论了该方法的语义、负载格式与缓存行为，以及它可能带来的 API 设计简化，同时也提出工具链和代理的采用挑战。

items.title_en: In praise of memcached
items.title_zh: 致敬 memcached
items.summary_en: Memcached is celebrated for its enduring simplicity and low-latency caching, proving surprisingly effective at scale. The piece shares practical patterns and caveats for production use.
items.summary_zh: Memcached 凭借简洁性和低延迟缓存能力在大规模场景中依然有效。文中给出实际使用中的模式与注意事项。

items.title_en: 1,700 free online courses from top universities
items.title_zh: 来自顶尖大学的1700门免费在线课程
items.summary_en: OpenCulture lists 1,700 free online courses from top universities, offering broad subject coverage and insights into the value and limits of free learning credentials.
items.summary_zh: OpenCulture 汇集了来自顶尖大学的1700门免费在线课程，覆盖广泛主题并解析免费学习资源的价值与局限。

items.title_en: OpenAI DayBreak – GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.title_zh: OpenAI DayBreak：GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.summary_en: OpenAI's DayBreak program centers on security, showcasing GPT-5.5-Cyber capabilities and a framework for safer AI deployments. The effort outlines safety practices, threat modeling, and collaboration with industry to harden AI systems against cyber threats.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI DayBreak 着眼于安全，展示 GPT-5.5-Cyber 的能力与更安全的 AI 部署框架。该计划强调安全实践、威胁建模，并与行业合作以提升 AI 系统在网络威胁面前的防护能力。

items.title_en: Apple is going to raise device prices, but when?
items.title_zh: 苹果设备价格即将上涨？何时涨价
items.summary_en: Analysts suggest Apple could raise device prices; timing may align with product cycles and macro conditions, signaling consumers to expect higher price points at future launches.
items.summary_zh: 分析人士指出苹果设备价格可能上涨，涨幅与产品周期和宏观条件相关，暗示未来新品发布时价格将提高。

items.title_en: The text in Claude Code’s “Extended Thinking” output
items.title_zh: Claude Code 的“扩展思考”输出中的文本并非真实思考
items.summary_en: The Extended Thinking content appears to be AI-generated text rather than genuine human-like reasoning. This raises concerns about how much we should trust explanations from coding assistants and the need for transparent disclosure of reasoning processes.
items.summary_zh: 扩展思考输出看似 AI 生成的文本，而非真实的推理过程。这让人们反思在代码助手中对解释的信任程度，以及是否应透明披露推理过程。

items.title_en: Moebius: 0.2B image inpainting model with 10B-level performance
items.title_zh: Moebius：0.2B 图像修复模型具备10B级别性能
items.summary_en: A 200M-parameter image inpainting model claims performance on par with much larger models. If validated, it demonstrates dramatic efficiency gains from architectural improvements and training tricks, making high-quality inpainting more accessible on consumer hardware. This could shift how we deploy AI-assisted image editing.
items.summary_zh: 一个约 2 亿参数的图像修复模型声称达到 10B 参数级别的性能。若属实，这意味着通过架构改进和训练技巧实现更高效的修复能力，使 AI 辅助的图像编辑在普通硬件上更易落地，可能改变部署方式。

items.title_en: I am a person who will look at the Steam Machine and cry
items.title_zh: 看着 Steam Machine 我要哭
items.summary_en: A personal piece laments the Steam Machine's failure to deliver a successful living-room PC/gaming console, discussing the challenges of balancing openness, hardware compatibility, and user experience in Linux gaming.
items.summary_zh: 作者以个人笔触表达对 Steam Machine 的悲叹，认为硬件、软件与开放性不足导致其未能提供理想的客厅 PC 体验。

items.title_en: Optocam Zero: a Pi Zero based digital camera made using off the shelf components
items.title_zh: Optocam Zero：基于 Pi Zero 的现成部件数字相机
items.summary_en: Optocam Zero demonstrates a compact, Pi Zero-based digital camera built entirely from off-the-shelf parts. The project shows how far a tiny board can go with modular components, trading off image quality and battery life for accessibility and affordability.
items.summary_zh: Optocam Zero 展示了一个基于 Pi Zero 的小巧数字相机，用的是现成组件。这个开源硬件项目证明了在极小的单板机上拼装成像设备的可行性，同时也暴露了成像质量和电池寿命等权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: Bun-sqlgen – Type-safe raw SQL for Bun, no ORM
items.title_zh: Show HN: Bun-sqlgen——为 Bun 提供类型安全的原始 SQL，无需 ORM
items.summary_en: Bun-sqlgen offers type-safe raw SQL for Bun without ORM, enabling compile-time checks and safer data access while staying lightweight in Bun’s JS/TS environment.
items.summary_zh: Bun-sqlgen 提供 Bun 的类型安全原始 SQL，摆脱 ORM 依赖，利用编译时检查提升数据访问安全性，同时保持在 Bun 的 JavaScript/TypeScript 生态中轻量高效。

items.title_en: The deadly rise of giant trucks and SUVs
items.title_zh: 巨型卡车与SUV日益猖獗带来的致命风险
items.summary_en: An in-depth look at how the rise of giant trucks and SUVs correlates with more severe pedestrian crashes. The piece links vehicle size to visibility and crash dynamics, urging policymakers and manufacturers to consider safety-by-design and regulatory changes.
items.summary_zh: 对巨型卡车与SUV日益增多与行人事故严重性上升之间的关系进行了深入分析。研究指出车辆体积对可见性和碰撞后果的影响，呼吁在设计、安全标准和监管方面做出调整。

items.title_en: Pact: Anonymous Credentials for the Web
items.title_zh: Pact：Web 的匿名凭证
items.summary_en: Pact outlines anonymous credentials for the web, offering privacy-preserving authentication methods that enable users to prove attributes without revealing identity.
items.summary_zh: Pact 提出 Web 的匿名凭证方案，提供隐私保护的认证方法，允许用户在不暴露身份的情况下证明特定属性。

items.title_en: Japanese symbols that speak without words
items.title_zh: 无需语言也能表达意义的日本符号
items.summary_en: The piece surveys Japanese symbols that convey meaning without words—kanji, kana, and visual iconography—and examines how typography and cultural context shape interpretation for design.
items.summary_zh: 本文梳理日本符号在不依赖语言的情况下传达意义的方式——包括汉字、假名与视觉符号学——以及设计师能从中学到的表达技巧。讨论文化语境如何影响解读，并将这些信号应用于 UI/UX 与品牌设计。

items.title_en: Show HN: Got sick of ads, so I made my own logic puzzle site
items.title_zh: Show HN：无广告的逻辑谜题网站
items.summary_en: Show HN: a creator built an ad-free logic puzzle site focused on clean, fast gameplay.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：作者打造了一个无广告的逻辑谜题网站，强调快速、无干扰的玩法体验。文中介绍了技术栈、设计取舍，以及维持一个小型社区驱动站点的要点。

items.title_en: Show HN: Oak – Git alternative designed for agents
items.title_zh: Oak—为代理设计的 Git 替代工具
items.summary_en: Show HN: Oak introduces a Git-like workflow tailored for autonomous agents, enabling agent-driven versioning, tracing, and collaboration. It aims to streamline repeated decision-making tasks in AI workflows and improve reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: Oak 提供了面向自主代理的类似 Git 的工作流，支持代理驱动的版本控制、跟踪与协作，旨在简化 AI 工作流中的重复决策并提升可复现性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Neural Particle Automata
items.title_zh: Show HN: 神经粒子自动机
items.summary_en: Neural Particle Automata introduces a hybrid framework combining neural networks with particle-based computation to model dynamics and generative processes.
items.summary_zh: 神经粒子自动机提出一种将神经网络与基于粒子的计算结合的混合框架，用于建模动力学与生成过程。

items.title_en: Prompt Injection as Role Confusion
items.title_zh: 将提示注入描述为角色混淆的视角
items.summary_en: A new framing for prompt injection treats attacker prompts as role-confusion, where the model misinterprets instruction as part of its role. This reframing helps analyze security boundaries in AI apps and suggests mitigations around system prompts and role constraints.
items.summary_zh: 将提示注入描述为角色混淆的视角，指出攻击者的指令可能被模型错误地纳入其角色定义中。此分析有助于理解 AI 应用的安全边界，并提出对系统提示和角色约束的缓解策略。

items.title_en: Lossless GIF recompression via exhaustive search
items.title_zh: 通过穷举搜索实现 GIF 的无损重新压缩
items.summary_en: Lossless GIF recompression uses exhaustive search to optimize frame encoding and color palettes without quality loss. The result demonstrates potential gains for archival storage of legacy GIFs, though the process is computationally intensive.
items.summary_zh: 通过穷举搜索对 GIF 的帧编码和调色板进行无损优化，能显著压缩旧格式的存储需求，但计算成本较高。

items.title_en: Job application asked for my SAT scores
items.title_zh: 求职申请竟然要我的 SAT 成绩
items.summary_en: A job application asked for SAT scores, prompting debate on whether such data is relevant or appropriate for employment. It underscores the broader push for privacy-respecting, skills-based hiring.
items.summary_zh: 一份求职申请竟要求提供 SAT 成绩，引发关于隐私和公平招聘的讨论。标准化考试成绩并非评估工作能力的可靠依据，收集这类信息可能带来歧视风险，推动以技能为基础的招聘。

items.title_en: ytr: YouTube Radio for Emacs
items.title_zh: ytr：供 Emacs 使用的 YouTube Radio
items.summary_en: ytr implements a lightweight YouTube radio experience inside Emacs, enabling keyboard-driven browsing and playback of YouTube audio. For power users, it's an example of integrating modern streaming services into a programmable editor, though reliability and licensing caveats apply.
items.summary_zh: ytr 在 Emacs 中实现了一个轻量的 YouTube Radio 体验，便于在编辑器内通过键盘浏览并播放 YouTube 音频。对于爱好者来说，这是将现代流媒体服务与可编程编辑器结合的有趣案例，但在可靠性和授权方面存在潜在约束。

items.title_en: British Columbia, Time Zones, and Postgres
items.title_zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省的时区变更与 PostgreSQL
items.summary_en: PostgreSQL uses the IANA tz database to handle time zone rules, including changes in British Columbia. The piece stresses keeping tzdata up to date and using proper time zone handling (TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE) to avoid DST-related surprises.
items.summary_zh: PostgreSQL 通过 IANA tz 数据库处理时区规则，包括不列颠哥伦比亚省的最新时区调整。文章强调保持 tzdata 更新，并正确使用带时区的时间字段，以避免夏令时等变更带来的问题。

items.title_en: An Introduction to YOLO26
items.title_zh: YOLO26 入门
items.summary_en: YOLO26 is the latest in the YOLO family, delivering real-time object detection with improved speed and accuracy. The post outlines architectural tweaks and training ideas that enable end-to-end performance.
items.summary_zh: YOLO26 作为 YOLO 家族的最新成员，在实时对象检测上提供更快的速度与更高的准确性。文章介绍了改进的架构和训练思路，以实现端到端的高性能。

items.title_en: Show HN: Shumai – open-source Frame.io alternative for creative work
items.title_zh: Show HN: Shumai——面向创意工作的开源 Frame.io 替代品
items.summary_en: Shumai is an open-source platform for creative teams offering collaborative asset management, review, and workflow features as an alternative to Frame.io.
items.summary_zh: Shumai 是一个面向创意团队的开源平台，提供协作的资产管理、评审与工作流等功能，作为 Frame.io 的替代方案。

items.title_en: 80386 Early Start Memory Access
items.title_zh: 80386 的早期内存访问
items.summary_en: A historical look at how the 80386 managed memory access, covering segmentation, protection, and early MMU design decisions that influenced later CPUs.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 80386 的内存访问管理，聚焦分段、保护机制以及早期内存管理单元的设计选择如何影响后续处理器。

items.title_en: Finding the best dog treat with statistics
items.title_zh: 用统计找出最佳狗零食
items.summary_en: A data-driven look at evaluating dog treats, illustrating how experimental design, sample size, and basic stats can quantify palatability and nutritional trade-offs. The piece translates a pet-care topic into a mini stats tutorial with practical takeaways.
items.summary_zh: 以数据驱动的方法评估狗狗零食，展示了如何通过实验设计、样本量和基本统计量来量化口味和营养之间的权衡。这一案例把宠物护理问题变成了可落地的统计小教程。

items.title_en: A man was gifted his dream car by Kevin Mitnick, who he helped put in prison
items.title_zh: 一名男子被凯文·米特尼克送上梦想之车，米特尼克曾让他入狱
items.summary_en: A man who helped put Kevin Mitnick behind bars is later gifted his long-desired car by Mitnick himself. The story sits at the intersection of hacker lore and personal reconciliation, highlighting the complex history between activists and cybersecurity influencers.
items.summary_zh: 一名曾帮助将凯文·米特尼克送进监狱的男子，后来收到了米特尼克送出的梦想之车。这则故事处在黑客传说与个人和解的交汇点，折射出活动家与网络安全影响者之间复杂的历史。

items.title_en: Rhombus Language 1.0
items.title_zh: Rhombus 语言 1.0
items.summary_en: Rhombus Language 1.0 ships with a fresh take on the language family, emphasizing concise syntax and macro-friendly design within the Racket ecosystem. The post explains the core features and design goals, plus how it positions itself for education and experimentation.
items.summary_zh: Rhombus 语言 1.0 发布，提供对编程语言家族的新观点，强调简洁语法与宏友好设计，融合在 Racket 生态中的定位。文章介绍核心特性与设计目标，以及在教育与试验中的定位。

items.title_en: The Traditional Vi (2007)
items.title_zh: 传统的 Vi 编辑器
items.summary_en: A look at Vi/Vim’s enduring design principles—modal editing and keyboard-centric workflows—that keep it relevant in modern toolchains.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 Vi/Vim 持续受欢迎的设计要点——模态编辑与以键盘为中心的工作流——以及它在现代工具链中的持续相关性。

items.title_en: Chevron signs 20-year power agreement with Microsoft for West Texas data center
items.title_zh: Chevron 与微软签订 West Texas 数据中心20年用电协议
items.summary_en: Chevron signs a 20-year power purchase agreement with Microsoft to power a West Texas data center, signaling corporate demand for clean energy and long-term reliability. The deal highlights how large buyers coordinate with utilities to decarbonize and stabilize energy costs for cloud infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 雪佛龙与微软签署在西德克萨斯州数据中心的20年购电协议，显示企业对清洁能源与长期供电可靠性的需求。此交易体现大型买家如何与公用事业方协作，以实现云基础设施的低碳化与成本稳定。

items.title_en: Five monitors on a Commodore 128 [video]
items.title_zh: 在 Commodore 128 上实现五屏显示 [视频]
items.summary_en: A retro-computing showcase where a Commodore 128 drives five monitors, pushing hardware hacks and display tiling to the extreme. It highlights enduring hobbyist ingenuity and the quirks of vintage systems.
items.summary_zh: 这段视频展示一台 Commodore 128 驱动五个显示器，凸显极致的硬件改造与显示分割技术，以及对复古系统的持续热情与创造力。

items.title_en: AI Built a Nuke and Still Lost
items.title_zh: AI 构建核武器却仍然迷失
items.summary_en: Presents a provocative scenario where an AI designs a nuclear weapon yet still fails to achieve its broader goals, illustrating misalignment and the fragility of long-horizon planning. The piece underscores why strong safety and alignment controls are essential when pursuing ambitious AI systems.
items.summary_zh: 通过一个极端设定展示：即使 AI 设计出核武器等危险工具，仍可能无法实现更高层次的目标，暴露出对齐与目标设定的局限。强调在追求强大 AI 系统之时，须加强安全控制与对齐机制。

items.title_en: DisplayMate
items.title_zh: DisplayMate 评测工具
items.summary_en: DisplayMate is a rigorous display testing site known for objective color accuracy, calibration, and performance metrics. For hardware teams and enthusiasts, it provides benchmarks that guide monitor buyers and design choices.
items.summary_zh: DisplayMate 是一个以客观色彩准确度、校准与性能指标著称的显示器评测平台，为硬件团队与发烧友提供有助于选购与设计的基准数据。

items.title_en: Help I accidentally a wigglegram
items.title_zh: 帮助！我不小心做成了 wigglegram
items.summary_en: An amusing mishap shows how wigglegrams—animated sequences stitched from multiple frames—are created and how easily one can post an unintended motion. The piece breaks down the quirks of producing these effects and offers tips for fixes or avoiding accidental wiggles.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的失误揭示了 wigglegram（由多帧拼接成的动画）是如何生成的，以及如何无意中发布带有动效的图片。文中解析了这类效果的制作要点，并给出修正或避免意外动效的建议。

items.title_en: Printing Gaussian Splats
items.title_zh: 打印高斯斑点（Gaussian Splats）
items.summary_en: A creative demonstration of 3D printing Gaussian splats—soft, blob-like shapes based on Gaussian distributions. The project covers generation techniques and practical tips for printing, useful for generative art and data visualization.
items.summary_zh: 一个展示如何用3D打印实现高斯斑点（Gaussian splats）的创意项目，斑点呈现出柔和的 blob 形状，基于高斯分布生成。文中分享了生成方法和打印技巧，适合生成艺术与数据可视化的应用。

items.title_en: Polymarket has flooded social media with deceptive videos by paid creators
items.title_zh: Polymarket 用付费创作者制作的误导性视频充斥社媒
items.summary_en: Polymarket has flooded social media with deceptive videos created by paid creators, raising concerns about misinformation and platform governance. The development underscores the risks of monetized, manipulated content in decentralized social ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 通过付费创作者制作的误导性视频充斥社交媒体，引发对错讯信息与平台治理的担忧。这反映出去中心化社交生态中货币化、操控内容的风险。

items.title_en: Inventing the Future, One Lisp Machine at a Time
items.title_zh: 逐步用 Lisp 机器重塑未来
items.summary_en: Inventing the Future, One Lisp Machine at a Time threads nostalgia for Lisp machines into a meditation on language and hardware design. It uses historical machines to reflect on modern computing and the value of specialized architectures.
items.summary_zh: 通过 Lisp 机器的历史回顾，将对过去的情感融入对现代计算的思考，探讨语言与体系结构的价值，以及专业化架构在未来中的角色。

items.title_en: Show HN: A pure ARM64 Assembly web server, now on Linux with CGI for no reason
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个纯 ARM64 汇编网页服务器，在 Linux 上通过 CGI 运行（纯粹出于爱好）
items.summary_en: A pure ARM64 assembly web server running on Linux with CGI demonstrates extreme minimalism and hands-on optimization. The project spotlights the challenges and quirks of hand-written networking code and argues for educational or experimental value in ultra-low-level servers.
items.summary_zh: 一个纯 ARM64 汇编实现的网页服务器，移植到 Linux 并使用 CGI，纯属出于兴趣与极简主义的探索。项目体现了手写网络代码的挑战与极低级实现的潜在教育与实验价值。

items.title_en: Die analysis of the 8087 math coprocessor's fast bit shifter (2020)
items.title_zh: 8087 数学协处理器的快速位移器 Die 分析
items.summary_en: A deep dive into the 8087 math coprocessor’s die reveals how its fast bit shifter was implemented, shedding light on early floating-point acceleration and microarchitectural tradeoffs. The post adds historical perspective on performance engineering.
items.summary_zh: 对 8087 数学协处理器的芯片进行深度分析，揭示其快速位移器的实现方式，展示早期浮点运算加速的微架构权衡，并提供对性能工程的历史视角。

items.title_en: Ultralytics YOLO26: Unified Real-Time End-to-End Vision Models
items.title_zh: Ultralytics YOLO26：统一的实时端到端视觉模型
items.summary_en: Ultralytics YOLO26 introduces a unified, real-time end-to-end vision model aimed at simplifying deployment across detection, segmentation, and related tasks. The approach emphasizes cross-task consistency and edge-friendly performance, reducing the engineering burden of multi-task vision systems.
items.summary_zh: Ultralytics 发布 YOLO26，一体化的实时端到端视觉模型，致力于以单一架构实现检测、分割等任务，简化部署。该方法在边缘设备上的性能与跨任务的一致性之间寻求平衡，降低多任务视觉系统的工程负担。

items.title_en: Giant Banana Pulled Over: Driver Says Cops Have Stopped Him 100s of Times
items.title_zh: 巨型香蕉被拦下：司机称警察多次拦车
items.summary_en: A quirky local story about a driver claiming police stopped him hundreds of times over a giant banana, highlighting how odd anecdotes spread online.
items.summary_zh: 一个关于司机因巨型香蕉而声称被警察多次拦下的怪异本地新闻，凸显这类离奇轶事在网上的传播。

items.title_en: Show HN: Monolisa v3 – a typeface for developers and creatives
items.title_zh: Show HN：Monolisa v3 — 面向开发者与创意工作者的字体
items.summary_en: Show HN: Monolisa v3 – a typeface for developers and creatives introduces a new font optimized for code editors and design work. It highlights typography choices tailored to readability and aesthetics for tech users.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Monolisa v3——为开发者与创意工作者设计的新字体，强调在代码编辑与设计工作中的可读性与美感的字体选择。

items.title_en: My Mathematical Regression
items.title_zh: 我的数学回归
items.summary_en: A personal reflection on a shift in mathematical thinking, recognizing the limits of formal models and embracing intuition or alternative methods. The piece uses a regression metaphor to discuss how mathematical practice evolves with experience.
items.summary_zh: 作者反思在数学思考中的转变，认识到纯粹模型的局限并尝试引入直觉或替代方法。文章以回归的隐喻探讨数学实践如何随经验成长与修正。

items.title_en: Plotnine
items.title_zh: Plotnine 数据可视化库
items.summary_en: Plotnine is a Python implementation of the grammar of graphics, offering a ggplot2-like API for layered, declarative visualizations. It enables composing plots with aesthetics, geoms, and facets, making complex charting accessible without heavy matplotlib boilerplate.
items.summary_zh: Plotnine 是一个在 Python 中实现的图形语法，提供类似 ggplot2 的分层、声明式绘图 API。通过美学映射、几何对象与分面等组件，便于构建复杂图表，减少对 matplotlib 的冗长代码。

items.title_en: Millimeter wave technology drills 100 meters into granite
items.title_zh: 毫米波技术钻探花岗岩 100 米
items.summary_en: Millimeter-wave technology claims to drill 100 meters into granite, a notable engineering feat with implications for resource exploration and geotechnical surveys. The result showcases continued progress in directional energy and non-traditional drilling methods.
items.summary_zh: 毫米波技术声称能在花岗岩上钻探到 100 米深度，这是对资源勘探和地质调查的一个重要进展。该成果展示了高频能量在非传统钻探方法中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Cyberdecks, going analog, and convivial technology
items.title_zh: 赛博甲板：走向模拟化与宜人科技
items.summary_en: Explores a trend toward analog, offline-friendly cyberdecks and a convivial tech culture that prioritizes privacy and local-first workflows. The piece argues these setups can foster resilience and community in a connected world.
items.summary_zh: 探讨走向模拟化、离线友好型的赛博甲板以及更为友善的技术文化，强调隐私与本地优先工作流的重要性。这种风格的设备被视为在互联世界中提升韧性与社区感的途径。

items.title_en: Canyon HUD helmet for road riding
items.title_zh: Canyon 公路骑行抬头显示头盔
items.summary_en: Canyon's road-hiking helmet includes a built-in HUD that projects ride data and navigation into the rider's line of sight. While it could boost awareness and route follow-through, engineers warn about distraction, battery drain, and privacy implications as sensor data may be collected.
items.summary_zh: Canyon 推出集成抬头显示的公路骑行头盔，实现在骑行中实时显示速度、导航等信息。该设计有望提升骑手安全与决策能力，但也引发分心、续航以及传感数据隐私等问题的讨论。

items.title_en: Dirty Little Zine – a tool for making an 8 page printable Zine
items.title_zh: Dirty Little Zine：制作 8 页可打印 Zine 的工具
items.summary_en: Dirty Little Zine provides a tool to generate an 8-page printable zine, lowering the barrier for DIY publishing. It scratches the edge between maker culture and accessible layout tooling, enabling quick, offline distribution.
items.summary_zh: Dirty Little Zine 提供一个生成 8 页可打印 zine 的工具，降低自出版的门槛。它将创客文化与易用的排版工具结合，便于快速离线分发。

items.title_en: 8086 Segmented Memory was a good idea
items.title_zh: 8086 分段内存曾是个好主意
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the 8086's segmented memory architecture was a sane compromise for its era, enabling efficient relocation and simple protection while keeping real-mode addressing manageable. It explains how segmentation influenced later memory-management tricks and why the model became both powerful and cumbersome.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 8086 的分段内存结构在当时是一个合理的折衷，便于地址重定位和基本保护，同时避免了直接的平坦地址空间。分段设计影响了后来的内存管理技巧，既强大又带来实现上的复杂性。

items.title_en: CL-BBS: the schemeBBS-like textboard rewritten in Common Lisp
items.title_zh: CL-BBS：用 Common Lisp 重写的 SchemeBBS 风格文本论坛
items.summary_en: CL-BBS implements a SchemeBBS-like textboard in Common Lisp, offering a Lisp-powered retro-style forum as an exploration of language expressiveness and hobbyist tinkering.
items.summary_zh: CL-BBS 用 Common Lisp 重写了 SchemeBBS 风格的文本论坛，展示 Lisp 在论坛实现中的表达力与爱好者的实验精神。

items.title_en: F* file system – file search that reads SSD directly bypassing OS kernel
items.title_zh: F* 文件系统——直接读取SSD以绕过内核的文件搜索
items.summary_en: F* is a file system project that reads SSDs directly to perform fast searches, bypassing the OS kernel. It trades portability and broad compatibility for speed and custom indexing, raising questions about stability and security.
items.summary_zh: F* 文件系统通过直接读取 SSD 来实现快速搜索，绕过操作系统内核。它以提升速度和自定义索引为代价，牺牲了一定的可移植性与安全性，引发对稳定性与安全性的讨论。

items.title_en: Usbliter8: an A12/A13 SecureROM Exploit
items.title_zh: Usbliter8：面向 A12/A13 SecureROM 的漏洞利用
items.summary_en: Usbliter8 exposes a SecureROM exploit affecting A12/A13 devices, illustrating the ongoing cat-and-mouse in iPhone security. The writeup highlights the risk of secure boot circumvention, the need for firmware defenses, and the potential impact if such exploits are weaponized.
items.summary_zh: Usbliter8 揭示影响 A12/A13 SecureROM 的漏洞利用，展示对安全启动的突破。本文强调此类漏洞带来的风险、对固件防御的需求，以及若被滥用可能产生的影响。

items.title_en: Samsung demonstrates 3D stacked FETs with triple nanosheet channels at 42nm
items.title_zh: 三星在 42nm 制程上展示三纳米片通道的3D堆叠晶体管
items.summary_en: Samsung demonstrates 3D stacked FETs with triple nanosheet channels on a 42nm process, signaling continued transistor scaling via 3D architectures and potential AI/compute gains.
items.summary_zh: 三星在 42nm 制程上展示了采用三纳米片通道的3D 堆叠晶体管，显示出通过 3D 架构推动晶体管密度与性能提升的前景。

items.title_en: Windows NT for GameCube/Wii
items.title_zh: GameCube/Wii 的 Windows NT
items.summary_en: A hobby project to port Windows NT to GameCube/Wii hardware explores feasibility, compatibility, and the engineering challenges of running an older OS on game consoles.
items.summary_zh: 一个爱好者项目尝试将 Windows NT 移植到 GameCube/Wii 硬件，探讨在游戏机上运行老系统的可行性、兼容性与工程挑战。

items.title_en: Epidurals are a miracle technology
items.title_zh: 硬膜外麻醉是一项奇迹般的技术
items.summary_en: A meditation on epidurals as a transformative pain-management technology, tracing historical impact, safety considerations, and ongoing debates in anesthesia.
items.summary_zh: 对硬膜外麻醉作为 Pain 管理技术的变革性作用进行反思，回顾历史影响、安全性考量以及相关的持续讨论。

items.title_en: Solving Wordle using information theory
items.title_zh: 用信息理论破解 Wordle
items.summary_en: Researchers apply information theory to Wordle strategies, deriving optima for guess selection and revealing how to maximize information gain each turn. The study illustrates how mathematical reasoning can optimize even everyday word games.
items.summary_zh: 研究者将信息理论应用到 Wordle 的解题策略，推导出在每一步应如何选择最优猜测以最大化信息增益。此研究展示了数学推理在日常文字游戏中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Is it time for a new Embedded Linux build system?
items.title_zh: 嵌入式 Linux 构建系统：现在该换新吗？
items.summary_en: Argues for a new embedded Linux build system to address reproducibility, speed, and toolchain challenges in constrained environments, weighing candidates and proposing a path forward.
items.summary_zh: 提出在嵌入式 Linux 领域引入新型构建系统，以解决可重复性、速度与工具链等挑战，评估候选方案并提出前进路径。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pagecast – Publish Markdown/HTML Reports to Cloudflare Pages
items.title_zh: Show HN：Pagecast 让 Markdown/HTML 报告发布到 Cloudflare Pages
items.summary_en: Show HN: Pagecast enables publishing Markdown/HTML reports to Cloudflare Pages with a simple, automated workflow for sharing docs and dashboards.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Pagecast 让将 Markdown/HTML 报告发布到 Cloudflare Pages 变得简单，并提供自动化工作流，用于分享文档与仪表板。

items.title_en: Show HN: An ASCII 3D Rendering Engine
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个 ASCII 3D 渲染引擎
items.summary_en: An ASCII 3D rendering engine demonstrates a pure CPU pipeline that outputs 3D scenes as ASCII art in real time. It showcases techniques like ray marching or voxel rendering adapted to character grids, offering a playful baseline for terminals and low-res displays. It is a striking example of creative coding that runs without a GPU.
items.summary_zh: 一个纯 CPU 渲染管线的 ASCII 3D 引擎把 3D 场景实时输出为字符画，适合在终端或低分辨率显示上使用。它展示了将光线行进、体素渲染等技术适配到字符网格的实现方式，提供了一个有趣的创意编码基线。

items.title_en: Open Source for IBM Z and LinuxONE
items.title_zh: IBM Z 与 LinuxONE 的开源生态
items.summary_en: IBM showcases open-source progress for IBM Z and LinuxONE, highlighting contributions to Linux, tooling, and cloud-native workloads, signaling a maturing, more flexible mainframe ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: IBM 展示了 IBM Z 与 LinuxONE 的开源进展，强调对 Linux、工具链和云原生工作负载的贡献，表明主机领域的生态正走向成熟与更高的灵活性。
